title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 7.0e
paragraphs: We’re making some adjustments to AAA ARAM, welcome to patch 7.0e!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.
Attacks and abilities’ damage Multiplier: Your attacks and abilities deal bonus equal to 3% Bonus Health → 1.5% Bonus Health
Shockwave damage multiplier: 10% Bonus Health → 5% Bonus Health
Puppetry is currently experiencing issues beyond expectations that may cause crashes and has been temporarily removed.
Fixed an issue where Panacea could incorrectly trigger Circle of Death.
